chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3505 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.16249/2017 3. For hearing of main case 26.03.2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Learned counsel for respondent department submits under instructions that the impugned notice herein is being withdrawn forthwith subject to the right of the respondent department to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
